ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "worker_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the worker providing the feedback */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree of feedback (e.g., price, size, hardness) */,
  "superordinate" TEXT /* Superordinate category of feedback (e.g., statues, floors, animals) */,
  "adjective" TEXT /* Descriptive adjective related to the feedback */,
  "adjective_positiveness" TEXT /* Positiveness of the adjective (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "noun_phrase" TEXT /* Noun phrase representing the specific subject of the feedback */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response provided by the worker */,
  "specific" INTEGER /* Specificity of the feedback (1 for specific, 0 for general) */,
  "sub_freq" INTEGER /* Subfrequency count of the feedback occurrence */,
  "super_freq" INTEGER /* Superfrequency of the feedback within the category */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* The date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* The time when the feedback was provided */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location where the feedback was given */,
  "sentiment_text" TEXT /* The text of the sentiment */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for any intervention that was applied post-feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_degree FOREIGN KEY ("degree") REFERENCES feedback_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the worker */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the worker is employed */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the worker */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* The date the worker was hired */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the worker's primary location */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the worker's direct manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager of the department */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location where the department is primarily situated */,
  "department_size" INTEGER /* The number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis entry */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback entry being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Calculated sentiment score derived from feedback */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "sentiment_text" TEXT /* The text of the sentiment */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for any intervention that was applied post-feedback */,
  "post_intervention_score" REAL /* Sentiment score after the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category of feedback */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback category (e.g., price, hardness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback category */,
  "category_weight" REAL /* A weight or importance factor for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_feedback_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback statistics entry */,
  "worker_id" TEXT /* Reference to the worker providing feedback */,
  "total_feedback" INTEGER /* Total number of feedback entries from the worker */,
  "positive_feedback" INTEGER /* Count of positive feedback entries */,
  "negative_feedback" INTEGER /* Count of negative feedback entries */,
  "average_sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score of the worker's feedback */,
  "most_common_adjective" TEXT /* The most common adjective used in the worker's feedback */,
  "most_common_noun_phrase" TEXT /* The most common noun phrase used in the worker's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_feedback_stats_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)
